title: Regulation (EU) 2024/1689 of the European Parliament and of the Council laying down harmonised rules on artificial intelligence (Artificial Intelligence Act)
ingestion_blocked_reason: HTTP 403 Forbidden returned on all EUR-Lex URL variants during automated session (May 2026). EUR-Lex blocks automated/non-browser retrieval.
